lesson.subtitle: Aula 15 -- Free Time & Hobbies
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Gabriela Paulucci | Aula 15 -- Free Time & Hobbies

listenings.text: Hi, I am Gabriela. Let me tell you about my weekend. On Saturday I usually sleep in, and then I relax at home in the morning. In the afternoon I often go out with my friends. We sometimes go for a walk in the park, or we meet for coffee. On Saturday night I always watch a movie at home. On Sunday I usually stay home and rest, because Monday is a busy day at the bank. I never work on Sunday. I love my quiet weekends. What do you do on the weekend?

Good afternoon, this is Daniel from the community club, with the weekend schedule. On Saturday morning we always open the pool at nine o'clock. In the afternoon there is a walk in the park for everyone who wants to join. On Saturday night we often show a movie in the big room. On Sunday the club is quiet, so it is a good day to relax, read, or meet your friends for coffee. We never close before six in the evening. Have a wonderful weekend, everyone.

extra_audio.text: On Saturday Gabriela usually sleeps in and relaxes at home. In the afternoon she often goes out with her friends. They sometimes go for a walk or meet for coffee. At night she always watches a movie. On Sunday she usually stays home and never works.
